---
name: Provider issue
about: Report a data provider, API key, rate limit, or fallback problem
title: "[Provider] "
labels: provider, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Provider Name

<!-- Example: FMP, Alpha Vantage, Marketaux, Nasdaq Symbol Directory, GLEIF, Wikidata, Xueqiu external link -->

## API Key Configured

<!-- yes / no / not required -->

## Key Visible In UI

<!-- Confirm it is masked only, e.g. abcd...wxyz. Do not paste the full key. -->

## Search Keyword / Symbol

<!-- Example: AAPL, IBM, Apple, Microsoft -->

## Error Message

<!-- Paste the user-visible error message. Do not paste full request URLs if they contain keys. -->

## Rate Limit / Quota Warning

<!-- Did the app show a rate limit, quota, daily limit, or free-tier warning? -->

## Other Providers

- Did other providers work? yes / no / not tested
- Which providers worked?

## Cache Fallback

- Did cache fallback work? yes / no / not tested
- Did the result show a from-cache or stale-cache state?

## Privacy And Safety

- Do not paste full API keys.
- Do not paste full request URLs containing `apikey`, `api_key`, `api_token`, `token`, `secret`, or `guid`.
- Do not upload local cache files unless a maintainer explicitly asks for a redacted sample.

## Additional Context

<!-- Include approximate time, region, network condition, or provider dashboard status if useful. -->
